core_beliefs.belief: 音乐是表达激情,但不应引起厌恶
core_beliefs.source: The passions, whether violent or not, should never be so expressed as to reach the point of causing disgust
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫扎特音乐哲学的核心:激情+美

core_beliefs.source: My main goal right now is to meet the emperor in some agreeable fashion
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫扎特职业生涯的抱负

core_beliefs.belief: 不要上课为生——通过作品赚足够
core_beliefs.source: I spend half my time writing the notes for the orchestra; the other half... is taken up with copying them out
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫扎特希望通过自由作曲家身份维持生活

core_beliefs.source: the bitter moment, which separates me from her, will not cease to affect me
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫扎特情感深度的体现

core_beliefs.belief: 我无法忍受巴赫被贬低
core_beliefs.source: I cannot bear to hear anyone slur the works of Bach, Handel, and Haydn
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫扎特对前辈的尊敬与对音乐的认真

core_beliefs.source: chance has a great deal to do with success in this world

core_beliefs.belief: 歌剧是音乐与戏剧的综合
core_beliefs.explanation: 莫扎特对歌剧的革命性贡献

core_beliefs.belief: 海顿是伟大的,我的儿子是最好的
core_beliefs.source: 海顿评莫扎特:你的儿子是我所知道的最伟大的作曲家
